title: Federal Reserve meeting, July jobs report, and Big Tech earnings: What to watch this week The stock market is at record highs as investors brace for what's expected to be the busiest week of the summer on Wall Street.
The V-shaped recovery in stocks is a V-shaped recovery in earnings: Chart of the Week A large upswing in earnings revisions has been driving the stock market to new all-time highs.

Stock market today: S&P 500 clears 5th-straight record, Nasdaq hits fresh high as earnings, trade hopes bolster stocks US stocks held steady after President Trump visited the Federal Reserve and Wall Street digested the latest batch of corporate earnings.
